prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学医学部在河北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约355名、313名、326名、477名、550名，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近3年累计后移约224名；2025年基准位次约550名，为近5年最低（位次数字最大）；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年26人、2022年24人、2023年23人、2024年25人、2025年26人；2026年计划增至28人，较2025年扩招约7.7%，扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争格局有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，北京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名第2名（2026年），属全国顶尖学府，学校层次对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内北京大学整体声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、录取空档等舆情事件，但作为全国顶尖学府，负面舆情对报考热度的实际影响有限；抖音热度排名第3（高热），关注度极高；2025年北京大学在湖北本科提前批首次出现招生空档，但属个别省份现象；北京大学医学部依托北京大学学科优势，拥有临床医学（A）、口腔医学（A）、基础医学（A）、护理学（A+）、药学（A+）、公共卫生与预防医学（A）等多个A类学科，学科实力全国顶尖，对医学类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2024年专业热度分析中均被评为推荐/高热推荐，热度持续走高；河北省2026年物理类考生估算约36.5万人，较2025年约36.3万人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；北京大学医学部位于北京市，属首都高校，对河北省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省物理类招生计划占其全国招生比例较小，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类扩招约7.7%（缓解竞争）、医学类专业热度持续高热（加剧竞争）、河北省考生小幅增加（加剧竞争）以及声誉偏负面（轻微降温）等多重因素，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约580名，位次区间514–646名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）（色盲不予录取）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）（色盲不予录取）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（色盲不予录取）
- 口腔医学（色盲不予录取）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间514–646名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档王牌专业（八年制本博连读）作为冲刺，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如500名以内）可重点冲刺一档临床/口腔八年制专业；位次接近区间上限（如630名以上）应以三档护理学、英语（医学英语）为主要保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University Health Science Center in Hebei Province Physics Category were approximately 355, 313, 326, 477, and 550, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 224 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 550, the lowest in the past 5 years (largest ranking number); the enrollment plan in Hebei Province Physics Category was 26 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 28, an expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and has a certain alleviating effect on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, which is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 2nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top national institutions, with strong attraction to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's overall reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving campus safety, admission vacancies, and other public opinion incidents, but as a top national institution, the actual impact of negative public opinion on application popularity is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high attention; in 2025, Peking University had its first admission vacancy in the Hubei undergraduate early batch, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon; Peking University Health Science Center, relying on Peking University's disciplinary advantages, has multiple A-level disciplines including Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Basic Medicine (A), Nursing (A+), Pharmacy (A+), and Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A), with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting medical candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology were rated as recommended/highly recommended in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with continuously rising popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province for 2026 is about 365,000, a slight increase from about 363,000 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition; Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, a capital city, with strong regional attraction for Hebei candidates; its enrollment plan in Hebei Province Physics Category accounts for a small proportion of its national enrollment, with a stable cross-provincial competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 7.7% expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (alleviating competition), the sustained high heat of medical majors (intensifying competition), the slight increase in Hebei candidates (intensifying competition), and the slightly negative reputation (slight cooling), the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 580, with a ranking range of 514–646.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program) (Color blindness not admitted)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program) (Color blindness not admitted)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (Color blindness not admitted)
- Stomatology (Color blindness not admitted)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Medical English) (Only English language candidates admitted)
- Nursing (Nursing Category) (Color blindness not admitted).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 514–646 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Programs) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical/Stomatology Eight-Year programs; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., above 630) should mainly choose Tier 3 Nursing, English (Medical English) as backup options.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学医学部在河北省历史类最低录取位次分别为约93名、97名、147名、48名、86名，波动较大，无明显单调趋势；2025年基准位次约86名；该校在河北省历史类招生计划2021年1人、2022年3人、2023年3人、2024年2人、2025年2人；2026年计划仍为2人，与2025年持平，招生规模极小且稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，985/211/双一流，软科排名第2，全国顶尖学府，层次极高；2026年北京大学整体声誉偏负面，但作为顶尖学府影响有限；抖音热度排名第3（高热），关注度极高；历史类招生专业仅英语（医学英语），对应北京大学外国语言文学学科评估A+，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 英语/外语类专业在2024年专业热度中评为一般观望，热度平稳；河北省2026年历史类考生估算约24.5万人，较2025年约24.4万人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；北京大学医学部位于北京，对河北考生吸引力强；历史类招生仅2人，名额极少，位次波动受个别高分考生报考行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类招生计划持平、考生总数小幅增加、英语专业热度平稳以及声誉偏负面等因素，预测2026年历史类最低录取位次约89名，位次区间39–139名。

一档（最难进）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the History Category at Peking University Health Science Center in Hebei Province were approximately 93, 97, 147, 48, and 86, with significant fluctuations and no clear monotonic trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 86; the enrollment plan for the History Category in Hebei Province was 1 person in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 2, unchanged from 2025, with a very small and stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university, ranked 2nd in the Soft Science Ranking, a top-tier national institution with an extremely high level; in 2026, Peking University's overall reputation is somewhat negative, but as a top-tier institution, the impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high attention; the only major offered in the History Category is English (Medical English), corresponding to Peking University's Foreign Language and Literature discipline rated A+, with top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English/foreign language majors are rated as generally watchable in the 2024 major popularity, with stable popularity; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 245,000, a slight increase from about 244,000 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition; Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, which is highly attractive to Hebei examinees; only 2 spots are available in the History Category, with very few slots, and ranking fluctuations are greatly influenced by the application behavior of individual high-scoring examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged enrollment plan for the History Category, a slight increase in the total number of examinees, stable popularity of the English major, and a somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 is approximately 89, with a ranking range of 39–139.
